name: セラ
prompt:
Create a photorealistic cinematic full-body character portrait for a modern web novel. Preserve silhouette clarity, costume readability, realistic anatomy, realistic fabric texture, and a consistent live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets.
Full-body portrait of Sera for the installment 'おっさんサトーの気ままな休日'. Preserve the exact face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, disciplined expression, and visible cat-ear headband support-security unit from the supplied canonical portrait. Redesign only the clothing and practical gear so they fit an early-summer covert bodyguard role during a quiet Sunday outing while remaining elegant, functional, and subtly maid-inspired: ivory high-neck blouse, blue-charcoal short jacket, dark long skirt-like culottes with a slim apron-like front line, low-heeled boots, compact shoulder gear, poised and controlled stance. She should read as a hidden professional protector, not a cosplay maid or tactical soldier.
Keep the whole character visible within frame when possible, especially head, key costume details, hands, silhouette, and signature accessories.
Final delivery will be center-cropped to 1080x1920. Keep the face, silhouette, and signature costume details near the center with safe margins.
Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, cropped head, doll-like face, oversexualized maid, tactical armor, combat bodysuit, sci-fi combat suit, comedy chibi style, soft helpless expression, anime heroine look, doll face, giant visible weapons, indoor maid dress
